description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 2"Product DetailsBeaded thong style straps with a synthetic toe separatorBrown footbed with stitch detail at the periphery and branding at the heel regionWedge style heel in brown Tough rubber outsole with patterned grooves for gripMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
